member.name: T:MatrixMath
member.summary: Class containing matrix math utility methods.

member.name: M:MatrixMath.Inverse2D(System.Double[0:,0:])
member.summary: Calculates the inverse of a 2x2 matrix and returns the resulting matrix.
member.returns: The inverted matrix, or [-1] if not 2x2 or non-invertible.
